<!-- One-sentence description of the feature. -->

## Problem / Motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? What pain point are you experiencing?

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Any alternative solutions or features you've thought about. Why is your proposed solution preferred? -->

## User Story

<!-- Optional: frame the feature as a user story.
     e.g. "As a reader, I want to bookmark books so that I can come back to them later." -->

As a **[type of user]**, I want to **[do something]** so that **[I get some benefit]**.
